title: Energizing Mexican Sterbottensost Tinga
description: A quick, nutty, pillowy Mexican tinga with Sterbottensost cheese tempered in chocolate, perfect for a keto lunch. The hot stone plate creates a sizzling, savory layer that melts into a creamy, spicy broth.
instructions: Heat the hot stone plate until very hot.
Sauté diced onion and minced garlic in olive oil until translucent.
Add sliced tomatoes and chipotle adobo sauce and cook until tomatoes break down.
Season the mixture with salt and pepper, then simmer for 8 minutes.
Cube the Sterbottensost cheese and add it to the simmering broth, stirring until melted.
Melt the tempering chocolate in a small bowl over low heat, then stir into the cheese mixture to create a velvety sauce.
Transfer the tinga onto the hot stone plate, letting it sear for 2 minutes for a crisp edge.
Serve immediately, garnished with fresh cilantro if desired.
